_help: Dated human sign-off ledger for the 'manual' rules — the judgment calls a script can't make (blast-radius, prior-art done, wedge/moat pressure-test). The gate treats a manual rule as satisfied ONLY if it has an entry here, so even judgment leaves a checkable, auditable trace. Add { by, date, note } per rule id.

TEST-03.note: Isolation + PII sweeps pinned to live table count (15/16); any new table turns CI red on arrival.

TEST-04.note: Every acceptance criterion's enums/fields cross-checked against their type defs; each 'must raise' has a negative test.

CTX-04.note: No frozen consolidated spec; decisions live in per-file ADRs with Status + Superseded-by.

CLAIM-05.note: Wedge=migration on-ramp, Moat=AI report-gen depth. Moat pressure-tested assuming interception/pipeline are free — holds on output quality.
